name: quality-pipeline
description: The 2026-07 trio in one flow: a scoring gate (zero-token deterministic quality bar with weighted combination), a reflexion loop (contract violations become feedback for the next iteration), and a side-effect-classified notification step (idempotent:false — never cached, never auto-retried).

phases.task: Analyze {args.topic} in this repository. Return JSON: {"summary": "...", "risks": ["..."], "recommendations": ["..."]}. Be substantive — cite concrete files and behaviors.

judge.task: Score this analysis 0.0-1.0 on depth, evidence quality, and actionability.
